settings.title: How easy is assembly for a Drink LLC product?
settings.answer: Every Drink LLC product arrives 95% assembled. With our step-by-step video guides, most riders are ready to ride in under an hour. Need help? Our USA-based team is just a phone call away and will walk you through it.

settings.title: What warranty does Drink LLC provide?
settings.answer: We back every bike with alifetime frame warrantyand a2-year warranty on all components. If an issue comes up, you’ll talk directly with us in Houston—not a third-party reseller.

settings.title: Can I service my Drink LLC product at a local shop?
settings.answer: Yes. We work with more than 180 bike shops across the U.S. for service and support. Use our Dealer Locator to find a trusted partner near you.

settings.title: Does my Drink LLC track data or require an app?
settings.answer: No. Your Drink LLC product is designed for freedom and privacy. You’ll never need to download an app, share personal data, or worry about being tracked to enjoy your ride.

settings.title: Questions We Get All the Time

settings.text: Every Drink LLC product is certified under SGSNA/24/CQ/00032 to meet the highest safety standards.
Every Drink LLC product is certified under SGSNA/24/CQ/00032 to meet the highest safety standards.

settings.title: Safer rides
settings.text: protection against overheating, electrical fires, and system errors.

settings.title: Longer lifespan
settings.text: certified batteries and components last longer under real-world use.

settings.title: True confidence
settings.text: you know what’s inside your bike has been tested to the highest level.

settings.title: Is certification required by law?
settings.answer: Not yet. But we don’t wait for mandates when it comes to safety. We certify every model because it’s the right thing to do for our riders.

settings.title: What if a bike isn’t certified?
settings.answer: Without certification, the risk of battery fires, shorts, and system failures is much higher. We refuse to take that risk with your safety.

settings.title: What does UL certification mean?
settings.answer: UL (Underwriters Laboratories) sets global safety standards. Through SGS, our bikes are tested to those standards to ensure batteries, wiring, and systems are all protected.
